common.subscribe_placeholder: Subscribe email, please enter your email

home.welcome_desc:
Your everyday AI companion that understands your work, helps you stay focused,
and moves you from idea to impact with less friction and more flow.
home.start_conversation: Start a conversation with these prompts in KINGDOM Super AI Agent
home.experience_speed2: bid farewell to tedious data entry, intelligent AI assistant, faster user interface. Complete all operations within 90 milliseconds - faster than a blink of an eye.
home.enterprise_software: Enterprise software should be like this!
home.open_source_desc1: Behind the system technology is a global community of more than 50 developers. United by the spirit of open source, we share a common vision: "Create change, empower employees, and bring the company to a new level".
home.open_source_desc2: KINGDOM offers two versions of services:
home.open_source_community: Community Edition: Open source code, 100% free
home.open_source_enterprise: Enterprise Edition: Additional applications, infrastructure and professional services.
home.no_vendor_lock_desc: No proprietary data formats, only PostgreSQL, data is completely yours! No software restrictions, you can own the source code, GitHub access, and freely choose to host on our infrastructure or build it locally.
home.customization_desc: Use KINGDOM Studio to automate operations, design custom screens, custom reports or web hooks.
home.pricing_desc: No usage-based pricing, no upselling of additional features, no long-term contract constraints, no hosting limits, and no unexpected fees... A one-time single price per user, all services included.
home.apps_desc: Based on its open source development model, KINGDOM has a powerful commercial application store. Imagine being able to easily obtain the corresponding application for any business need.
home.not_joking_desc: "Most software may only achieve 70% of the functions and effects you expect. However, KINGDOM far exceeds expectations and will completely change the market pattern, bringing earth-shaking changes." - Anonymous Peer.
home.company_intro1: Committed to providing efficient and intelligent open source solutions for enterprise management, it is one of the rapidly growing software service providers in the global industry, with more than 7.5 million users upgrading digitally. Through a series of business applications covering the entire business chain, highly integrated and easy to use, it helps enterprises realize information reform, reduce costs and increase efficiency, and release the company's growth potential.
home.company_intro2: Its unique value lies in being an application that is very easy to use and fully integrated.

app_list.ai_office_desc: AI Empowers Office, Efficiency at Full Capacity with One Click
app_list.command_dispatch_desc: Resources, on-site, dispatch, process fully visible
app_list.real_time_collaboration_desc: Break time and space constraints, real-time collaboration without barriers
app_list.cloud_classroom_desc: Training management and learning interaction platform based on mobile Internet
app_list.intelligent_approval_desc: Intelligent approval integration of management and handling helps improve enterprise efficiency
app_list.secure_email_desc: Ensure the confidentiality and security of information transmission
app_list.cloud_disk_desc: One-click to cloud, files on the go, multi-terminal synchronization more worry-free
app_list.video_fusion_desc: Intelligently fuse video streams, panoramic view with one click
app_list.video_conference_desc: Start video conference with one click, communication and collaboration without barriers
